languages.text: Необходимо получить коды доступа к дворцовым вратам и передать их Ювенне.

traits.locale_text: Необходимо получить коды доступа к дворцовым вратам и передать их Ювенне.

languages.text: You must obtain the access codes to the palace gates and give them to Juvenna.
languages.original_text: Необходимо получить коды доступа к дворцовым вратам и передать их Ювенне.

languages.text: 你必须拿到宫殿大门的通行代码，并交给尤文娜。
languages.original_text: You must obtain the access codes to the palace gates and give them to Juvenna.

traits.locale_text: 你必须拿到宫殿大门的通行代码，并交给尤文娜。

languages.text: Debes obtener los códigos de acceso de las puertas de palacio y dárselos a Juvenna.
languages.original_text: You must obtain the access codes to the palace gates and give them to Juvenna.

traits.locale_text: Debes obtener los códigos de acceso de las puertas de palacio y dárselos a Juvenna.

languages.text: Vous devez mettre la main sur les codes d'accès des portes du palais et les donner à Juvenna.
languages.original_text: You must obtain the access codes to the palace gates and give them to Juvenna.

traits.locale_text: Vous devez mettre la main sur les codes d'accès des portes du palais et les donner à Juvenna.

languages.text: Du musst die Zugangscodes für die Tore des Palastes beschaffen und Juvenna übergeben.
languages.original_text: You must obtain the access codes to the palace gates and give them to Juvenna.

traits.locale_text: Du musst die Zugangscodes für die Tore des Palastes beschaffen und Juvenna übergeben.

languages.text: Saray kapılarının erişim kodlarını ele geçirmeli ve onları Juvenna'ya vermelisin.
languages.original_text: You must obtain the access codes to the palace gates and give them to Juvenna.

traits.locale_text: Saray kapılarının erişim kodlarını ele geçirmeli ve onları Juvenna'ya vermelisin.

languages.text: 宮門のアクセスコードを手に入れて、ジュベナに渡すこと。
languages.original_text: You must obtain the access codes to the palace gates and give them to Juvenna.

traits.locale_text: 宮門のアクセスコードを手に入れて、ジュベナに渡すこと。
